svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ FAST CORNER DETECTION │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
Circle of 16 pixels around candidate point p:
1 2 3 16 4 15 p 5 14 6 13 7 12 11 10
FAST-9: Corner if 9+ contiguous pixels are ALL brighter or ALL darker than center pixel p by threshold t.
Quick rejection: First check pixels 1, 5, 9, 13 - At least 3 must be brighter or darker for possible corner
